item.title: RAF on High Alert to Defend Falklands Amid US Hints Supporting Argentina
item.description: The RAF chief says protecting the Falklands is non-negotiable after US hints at support for Argentinian sovereignty claims, signaling potential shift in UK-US relations over the disputed territory.
item.dc:creator: The Telegraph

item.title: BP Considers Abandoning North Sea Operations Amid Windfall Tax Pressure
item.description: BP is reviewing its North Sea oil and gas operations as new CEO responds to high windfall taxes and challenging economics, potentially marking major shift in UK energy security.
item.dc:creator: The Telegraph

item.title: Trump Says Not Happy With Italy, Spain Over Iran Nuclear Stance Split
item.description: President Trump criticized Italy and Spain for their positions on Iran nuclear negotiations, saying those who think it is okay for Iran to have nuclear weapons are mistaken.
item.dc:creator: Anadolu Agency

item.title: US Treasury Warns Ships Not to Pay Hormuz Tolls to Iran
item.description: The Treasury Department warned US shippers they could face sanctions for paying Iranian tolls for passage through the Strait of Hormuz, tightening economic pressure on Tehran.
item.dc:creator: The Hill

item.title: 14 IRGC Members Killed in Demining Operation in Northwestern Iran
item.description: Fourteen IRGC soldiers were killed during operations to defuse unexploded ordnance in Zanjan province, highlighting ongoing dangers from recent conflict.
item.dc:creator: Al Arabiya

item.title: Russia Launches 400 Drones in Daytime Attack on Ukraine
item.description: Russia launched 400 drones in a daytime attack targeting multiple Ukrainian cities, marking one of the largest drone assaults of the war.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: White House Declares Iran War "Terminated" as War Powers Deadline Hits
item.description: The White House declared the Iran war "terminated" as the 60-day War Powers deadline arrived, avoiding congressional authorization requirement.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: Trump "Not Satisfied" With Iran's Latest Peace Proposal
item.description: President Trump expressed dissatisfaction with Iran's latest peace proposal, saying negotiations are "not getting there" as ceasefire talks remain deadlocked.
item.dc:creator: AP News

item.title: Atlantic Alliance Creaks as US-Europe Split Deepens Over Iran
item.description: Mixed messages and military mismatches are eroding the US-European Atlantic pact as the Iran conflict exposes strategic divergences.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: Russian Drone Strike Damages Odesa Port Infrastructure
item.description: A Russian drone strike hit port infrastructure in Ukraine's Odesa region, officials said, damaging key export facilities.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: Trump to Raise EU Auto Tariffs to 25%
item.description: President Trump announced he will raise tariffs on EU automobiles to 25%, escalating transatlantic trade tensions.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: Ukraine Announces Army Reform as Peace Talks Stall
item.description: Ukraine rolled out major army reforms including pay raises and new service terms as Zelensky seeks to modernize forces amid stalled peace talks.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: Iranian Crypto Exchange Used by IRGC to Move Millions
item.description: One of Iran's most powerful families founded its largest crypto exchange, which has been used by the IRGC to move millions in oil proceeds.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: Transatlantic Frost Deepens as Trump Attacks European Leaders
item.description: President Trump's attacks on European leaders are worsening the transatlantic frost as the Iran conflict exposes divisions.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: Investors Running Out of Time to Brace for Oil Shock
item.description: Investors are running out of time to brace for a true oil shock as the Iran conflict continues to threaten global supply.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: US Sanctions Iranian Shadow Banking Networks Moving Oil Proceeds from China
item.description: The US sanctioned Iranian shadow banking networks facilitating oil proceeds from China, targeting Tehran's sanctions evasion.
item.dc:creator: Al-Monitor

item.title: Japan Refiner Buys Russian Oil as Middle East Alternative
item.description: A Japanese refiner has purchased Russian oil as an alternative to Middle East supplies amid regional instability.
item.dc:creator: Nikkei Asia

item.title: Lebanon Death Toll Surpasses 2,600 Since March 2 Israeli Offensive
item.description: The death toll in Lebanon has surpassed 2,600 since the March 2 Israeli offensive began, with casualties continuing to mount.
item.dc:creator: Anadolu Agency

item.title: Ukrainian Firm Unveils Mid-Range Drone to Exhaust Russian Air Defenses
item.description: A Ukrainian firm unveiled a lightweight, cost-effective mid-range drone designed to exhaust Russian air defense systems.
item.dc:creator: Kyiv Independent

item.title: Oil Rally Stalls as Iran Proposal Triggers Profit-Taking
item.description: Oil prices stalled as Iran's latest peace proposal triggered profit-taking among investors betting on continued conflict.
item.dc:creator: Oil Price

item.title: Iran submits new peace proposal to US via Pakistani mediators
item.description: Iran submitted a new peace proposal to the US via Pakistani mediators, but the UAE says Iran cannot be trusted over Hormuz peace efforts.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: US Navy taps AI firm to counter Iranian mines in Strait of Hormuz
item.description: The US Navy has tapped an AI firm to help counter Iranian mines in the Strait of Hormuz, enhancing mine detection capabilities.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: France24: Iran supreme leader vows to protect nuclear and missile capabilities
item.description: Iran's supreme leader vowed to protect the country's nuclear and missile capabilities amid ongoing negotiations with the US.
item.dc:creator: France24

item.title: Japan Eases Weapons Export Rules, Opening Path for Ukraine Arms Supplies
item.description: Japan has eased weapons export rules, opening a potential path for arms supplies to Ukraine as Tokyo shifts defense policy.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: Ukrainian Drones Strike Russian Tuapse Port, Creating Environmental Disaster
item.description: Ukrainian drones struck the Russian Tuapse port, creating an environmental disaster with toxic aftermath from the refinery attack.
item.dc:creator: Reuters
